responses.roadComment: Roads are frequently dug up for utility repairs shortly after being paved, but they are rarely restored properly
responses.safetyComment: no one comes to sweep the roads. Fallen leaves and thick dust are left to accumulate, making the neighborhood look neglected,
responses.businessComment: it is good nothing to change
responses.loveText: wonderful, quiet neighborhood that is almost perfect—if only the local authorities would do their job and keep the infrastructure up to par.
responses.commentsText: gutters and 24 hours water and underground electricity was promised still waiting for it and if they give 24 hours water please give meter at the same time otherwise people will misuse it roads management should be done sweeper should be appointed
